notes:
## 1.7.6

## What's new

- **Never times out waiting for parent** — kid asks stay open on the family link until Approve or Deny. Phones stay synced; tap Refresh anytime.
- **Richer parent Approves** — 5 / 10 / 15 / 30 / 45 / 60 / 2h / 3h, Always allow, or Approve as asked.
- **What's new always ships** — update screen shows release notes from `latest.json` by default (even when you are already up to date).

## Update tip

Install on **both** phones. On parent: open an ask and try Always allow / 2h. On kid: Ask for Fun and leave it open — it will not say Timed out.
